# Braza Cleaning Services — brazacleaning.com

> Professional cleaning company in Central Florida. Licensed, bonded & insured (Florida LLC #L24000067571).
> Rated 5.0 stars across 70 Google reviews. Family-owned, led by founders Luana & Luciano.
> Phone/WhatsApp: (689) 242-7469 · Email: brazacleaningflorida@gmail.com
> Hours: Mon-Fri 8am-6pm, Sat 8am-4pm, Sun 9am-2pm. Free quotes in under 2 hours.

## Services (with typical pricing)
- House cleaning: https://brazacleaning.com/house-cleaning/ — standard cleans $120–$205/visit
- Deep cleaning: https://brazacleaning.com/deep-cleaning/ — from $220 (recommended first visit)
- Recurring cleaning (weekly/biweekly/monthly): https://brazacleaning.com/recurring-cleaning/ — from $120/visit, no contracts
- Maid services: https://brazacleaning.com/maid-services/ — same 2-person team every visit
- Airbnb turnover cleaning: https://brazacleaning.com/airbnb-cleaning/ — from $120 (1–2 BR), same-day available
- Vacation rental cleaning (property managers): https://brazacleaning.com/vacation-rental-cleaning/ — portfolio pricing
- Move-in / move-out cleaning: https://brazacleaning.com/move-in-cleaning/ · https://brazacleaning.com/move-out-cleaning/ — $160–$370
- Commercial / janitorial: https://brazacleaning.com/commercial-cleaning/ · https://brazacleaning.com/janitorial-services/ — custom quotes in 24h
- Post-construction cleaning: https://brazacleaning.com/post-construction-cleaning/

## Detailed pricing (typical ranges, 2026)
House cleaning (standard): 1-2 BR $120–$165 · 3 BR $130–$180 · 4 BR $145–$205 · 5+ BR $215+
Deep cleaning: 1-2 BR $140–$230 · 3 BR $220–$290 · 4 BR $250–$330 · 5+ BR $340+
Move-in/move-out: 1-2 BR $160–$265 · 3 BR $250–$330 · 4 BR $280–$370 · 5+ BR $380+
Airbnb turnover: 1-2 BR from $120 · 3 BR from $150 · 4-5 BR from $190 · luxury villas $300+
Linen/laundry add-on for vacation rentals: $30–$90 depending on bed count.

## What's included in a standard clean (57-point checklist highlights)
Bedrooms (12 pts): dusting, floors, mirrors, ceiling fans, baseboards, trash.
Bathrooms (13 pts): sanitize toilets/showers/tubs, grout wipe-down, mirrors, fixtures.
Kitchen (14 pts): counters, appliance exteriors, sink, cabinet fronts, floors.
Living areas (10 pts): furniture, electronics dusting, floors, entryways.
Final pass (8 pts): doorknobs, light switches, trash removal, scent finish.

## Airbnb/vacation rental specifics
- Calendar-synced scheduling; same-day turnovers; photo documentation on request
- Hotel-style staging, guest-ready standard; restocking essentials
- Serving Kissimmee resort communities (Reunion, Storey Lake, Windsor Hills, Windsor at Westside, Solterra, ChampionsGate, Emerald Island), Davenport, Celebration, Four Corners, Orlando

## Frequently asked
Q: How much does house cleaning cost in The Villages, FL?
A: Typically $120–$200 per standard visit depending on home size; deep cleans from $220.
Q: How much does Airbnb cleaning cost in Kissimmee, FL?
A: Turnovers start at $120 for 1–2 bedroom units; large resort villas range $190–$300+.
Q: Are you licensed and insured?
A: Yes — Florida LLC #L24000067571, bonded, general liability + workers' comp on every job.
Q: Do you require contracts?
A: No. All recurring service is month-to-month.
Q: Same-day service?
A: Yes for Airbnb turnovers in most resort areas near Disney, with 2–3 hours notice when slots allow.

## Real client reviews (Google, 5.0★)
- "Their turnover cleaning is always detailed and reliable, and our guests constantly comment on how clean the house is." — Fabriner Silva, Airbnb host, Kissimmee
- "Since I started working with them, my Airbnb ratings have improved significantly." — Isabella Carvalho, Kissimmee/Davenport host
- "The same team comes every Friday, always on time... the only ones we've trusted enough to give a key to." — Erika Moreto, The Villages
